title: TritonAI Roadmap
description: A public, status-based view of the TritonAI ecosystem from the 2023 chatbot launch through the 2026 governed builder path. Aligned to the TritonAI Ecosystem Timeline presented to campus leadership.
source: TritonAI Ecosystem Timeline (tritongpt-deck.vercel.app, executive audience) and public product pages

items.title: Beta & Training
items.summary: Secured Chancellor's Office funding, invited 400+ staff to the campus beta, and launched AI Essentials I in the UC Learning Center.

items.title: Early Launch
items.summary: Began the phased rollout and launched the UC San Diego Assistant and Job Description Helper.

items.title: Campus-Wide
items.summary: Opened campus-wide availability for ~37K employees, upgraded to Llama 3 with campus SSO, and refreshed the UI with file upload.
items.source: TritonAI Ecosystem Timeline and TritonGPT release notes

items.title: Adoption
items.summary: Grew Fund Manager Coach adoption, expanded departmental use cases, and began infrastructure planning for the next platform phase.

items.title: Platform Prep
items.summary: Upgraded the platform architecture for scale and prepared the model gateway for both commercial and local LLMs.

items.title: Universal Access
items.summary: Onboarded 45K students, made GPT-4o and Llama 4 Scout the default models, and launched the 128K context window with My Documents.
items.source: TritonAI Ecosystem Timeline and public release notes

items.title: Widget & Infra
items.summary: Deployed the Blink AI widget without a login requirement and integrated LiteLLM to enable model choice.

items.title: Advanced Tools
items.summary: Launched AI-powered search and the Blink AI overview, expanded model choice for higher-value use cases, and began the Deep Research and chat UI refresh.
items.source: TritonAI Ecosystem Timeline and public release notes

items.title: Ecosystem Expansion
items.summary: Launched transcript OCR and student record matching, expanded instructional AI to 8 courses with scheduling assistant pilots, and opened the TritonAI site with API access and early N8N workflows.
items.owner: TritonAI solutions team and sponsoring units

items.title: Process Automation
items.summary: Refined contract review with adjustable redlining, piloted an Academic Advising Agent proof of concept, and launched an AI IT observability pilot.

items.title: Governed Builder Path
items.summary: Connecting Developer APIs, Agent Builder, and the skills library to reusable capabilities; governing data access and tool calls with MCP connectors and observability; and turning successful prototypes into supported campus tools via Campus App Hosting.

items.title: Governed agency at campus scale
items.summary: Evaluating repeatable, supervised agent workflows that can use approved tools and connectors while retaining accountable human review.
items.owner: TritonAI program and campus governance partners
